summary: December 2025 Cavallo email newsletter covering the Donkey King video series, Megan Hensley's $1 donkey hoof-care membership, and free downloads of Carole Herder's three hoof-care guides.
Blog post celebrating Cavallo's 20th anniversary, tying the milestone to the Year of the Fire Horse and reflecting on founder Carole Herder's two-decade journey building the hoof boot brand.

Product page for Cavallo LEB (Long Ear Boot) donkey hoof boot cushion pads/insoles, 5mm microcellular foam for shock absorption, rehab support (laminitis, abscesses), and improved boot fit; sold in pairs.
Post announcing founder Carole Herder named a Regional Finalist in the 2025 RBC Canadian Women Entrepreneur Awards, with local Sunshine Coast BC newspaper recognition and Cavallo's origin story.
April 2026 Cavallo newsletter spotlighting Cavallo boots appearing in Ella Langley's American Eagle ad and other celebrity productions, plus a tribute to Endo the Blind horse.
Landing page promoting the free downloadable Cavallo Winter Hoof Care Guide eBook, covering snowballing, traction, thrush prevention, and using hoof boots for cold-weather riding and turnout.

Submission form inviting horse owners to share Cavallo boot success stories (laminitis, navicular, thrush, ringbone rehab) as case studies for possible publication on Cavallo's website and social channels.
Informational guide on treating and managing hoof cracks (vertical, toe, quarter) with Cavallo Hoof Boots, covering causes, assessment, trimming, nutrition, and rehabilitation support.

Post from founder Carole Herder explaining the Cavallo price adjustment effective March 1, 2026, citing rising material, manufacturing, and transportation costs, with a 10% first-order discount offer.
May 2026 Cavallo newsletter featuring the rescue story of Aquaman, a donkey trapped in an Arizona canal whose worn hooves recovered with Cavallo boots, framed around equine comfort and movement.
Lead-magnet landing page offering a free download of Carole Herder's book 'Hoof Prints on the Journey' plus hoof-care tips and offers, focused on natural hoof care, wellness, and balance.

Late April 2026 Cavallo Journal covering a hoof-crack-to-comeback case study and how the Consteed Smart Horse Sneaker is built on the Cavallo Trek Hoof Boot, blending hoof protection with movement-tracking tech.
